summary: Comprehensive testing of match loading state fixes and avatar rendering. Primary fix for initialFetchDone works partially - no error flash on page refresh confirmed, but initial loading skeleton behavior needs refinement. Avatar object-cover fix not yet applied to team crest images.

critical_bugs.impact: Blocks proper matches data fetching, causing fallback to cached/mock data

flaky_endpoints.symptoms: WebSocket connection fails - 'WebSocket is closed before the connection is established'

ui_bugs.issue: Initial loading skeleton not showing on first page load - skeleton only appears during league filter switches
Team crest images using object-contain instead of object-cover object-center - causes image distortion in circular containers
Empty state not showing when API returns empty results - app may be using stale cache

integration_issues.issue: Top Live tab content not displaying properly when clicked

passed_tests: ✅ No error flash on page refresh - initialFetchDone fix working
✅ Loading skeleton shows during league filter switching
✅ Error state properly displayed on API failure with retry button
✅ Match tabs (Popular, Soon, Ended) functional and displaying content
✅ UI loads successfully and displays match data
✅ User login and authentication working (Level 2 badge visible)
✅ Favorite tab appears for authenticated users

success_percentage.frontend: 75% - Main loading fix works, minor UI issues remain

high_priority: Fix backend API 401 authentication issues - matches endpoint returning unauthorized
Apply object-cover object-center classes to team crest images (currently using object-contain)
Investigate why initial loading skeleton doesn't show on first page load (only shows during filter switches)
medium_priority: Fix WebSocket connection for live match updates
Fix Top Live tab content display issue
Improve empty state handling when API returns empty results
